name: Driftwood Logo T-Shirt
description: Soft cotton tee with the Driftwood Brewing Company logo, unisex sizing

name: Driftwood Pint Glass
description: 16 oz etched pint glass featuring the taproom wave mark

name: Brewery Trucker Hat
description: Five-panel trucker hat with embroidered Driftwood patch

name: Mixed Can 4-Pack
description: Build-your-own four pack of 16 oz cans from current taproom releases

name: Anniversary Wild Ale Release Ticket
description: Admission to the annual Wild Ale release party including a commemorative pour

name: Mug Club Membership
description: Monthly Mug Club membership: dedicated mug, member pours, and early can access
